title: Directly loading WordPress core files
summary: Including wp-load.php or wp-config.php directly is forbidden. It typically indicates an insecure script meant to be accessed directly bypassing the WordPress loader.

guidance.why_it_matters: Directly loading wp-load.php bypasses WordPress security and routing, leading to likely exploit paths.
guidance.fix: Always use WordPress API hooks (e.g. admin-post.php or admin-ajax.php) to handle requests, never access a PHP file directly via URL.
guidance.false_positive_risk: Medium. Mentioning 'wp-load.php' in strings or docs might false-flag.
